title: Qiyr #7025
definition:
Kir-hareseth or Kir-hares or Kir-haresh = "wall of potsherds"

 1) one of the two chief strongholds of Moab
nasbUsage:
Definition: Kir-hareseth or Kir-hares or Kir-haresh = "wall of potsherds"

 1) one of the two chief strongholds of Moab

    NASB:  wall of earthenware, a fortified city in Moab
